name: cloudana
description: Cloudana DePIN Compute Marketplace with POUW Integration

scripts.build: npm run build:frontend && npm run build:provider && npm run build:contracts && npm run build:bridge
scripts.deploy:testnet: cd contract && npx hardhat run scripts/deploy-mvp.ts --network baseSepolia
scripts.deploy:mainnet: cd contract && npx hardhat run scripts/deploy-mvp.ts --network base
scripts.test: npm run test:frontend && npm run test:provider && npm run test:contracts
scripts.setup: npm run install:all && npm run build
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd client && npm install --legacy-peer-deps && cd ../provider-node-sdk && npm install && cd ../contract && npm install && cd ../akash-bridge && npm install
scripts.clean: rm -rf node_modules client/node_modules provider-node-sdk/node_modules contract/node_modules akash-bridge/node_modules client/dist provider-node-sdk/dist contract/artifacts contract/cache akash-bridge/dist
scripts.lint: npm run lint:frontend && npm run lint:provider

author: Cloudana Team
